sentences.target: Ta réussite me rend super content.

translations.fr: Ta réussite me rend super content.
translations.en: Your success makes me super happy.
translations.es: Tu éxito me hace súper feliz.
translations.it: Il tuo successo mi rende super felice.
translations.ko: 네 성공이 나를 정말 행복하게 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的成功让我超级开心.
translations.pt: Seu sucesso me deixa super feliz.
translations.vi: Thành công của bạn làm tôi rất vui.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी सफलता मुझे बहुत खुश करती है.
translations.el: Με χαροποιεί πολύ η επιτυχία σου.
translations.ro: Succesul tău mă bucură foarte mult.
translations.ja: あなたの成功がすごくうれしいです.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), feminine singular, modifies ‘réussite’.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase.
Clitic object pronoun (1st person singular), direct object of ‘rend’.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); takes ‘me’ as object and an object predicative.
Adverbial intensifier modifying the adjective ‘content’.
Adjective, masculine singular; object predicative describing ‘me’.

sentences.target: On célèbre sa réussite ce soir.

translations.fr: On célèbre sa réussite ce soir.
translations.de: Wir feiern heute Abend ihren Erfolg.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我们庆祝她的成功.
translations.yue: 我哋今晚慶祝佢嘅成功.
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы отмечаем её успех.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos celebrar o sucesso dela.
translations.he: הלילה אנחנו חוגגים את ההצלחה שלה.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi sẽ ăn mừng thành công của cô ấy.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми святкуємо її успіх.
translations.hu: Ma este az ő sikerét ünnepeljük.
translations.hi: आज रात हम उसकी सफलता का जश्न मना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ γιορτάζουμε την επιτυχία της.
translations.nb: I kveld feirer vi hennes suksess.
translations.da: I aften fejrer vi hendes succes.
translations.ja: 今夜は彼女の成功を祝います.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as the subject (3rd person singular agreement).
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular).
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), feminine singular, modifies ‘réussite’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘célèbre’.
Demonstrative determiner introducing the temporal noun ‘soir’.
Common noun, masculine singular; part of the temporal expression ‘ce soir’ (adverbial time complement).

sentences.target: Je veux fêter ta réussite avec toi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø fe.te ta ʁe.y.sit a.vɛk twa/

translations.fr: Je veux fêter ta réussite avec toi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø fe.te ta ʁe.y.sit a.vɛk twa/
translations.en: I want to celebrate your success with you.
translations.de: Ich möchte deinen Erfolg mit dir feiern.
translations.it: Voglio festeggiare il tuo successo con te.
translations.ko: 네 성공을 너와 함께 축하하고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想和你一起庆祝你的成功.
translations.yue: 我想同你一齊慶祝你嘅成功.
translations.ru: Я хочу отпраздновать твой успех вместе с тобой.
translations.pt: Quero celebrar o seu sucesso com você.
translations.he: אני רוצה לחגוג את ההצלחה שלך איתך.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn cùng bạn ăn mừng thành công của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik wil jouw succes met jou vieren.
translations.uk: Я хочу відсвяткувати твій успіх разом з тобою.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी सफलता तुम्हारे साथ मनाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę świętować twój sukces razem z tobą.
translations.el: Θέλω να γιορτάσω την επιτυχία σου μαζί σου.
translations.nb: Jeg vil feire suksessen din sammen med deg.
translations.sv: Jag vill fira din framgång med dig.
translations.ro: Vreau să sărbătoresc reușita ta împreună cu tine.
translations.cs: Chci s tebou oslavit tvůj úspěch.
translations.da: Jeg vil fejre din succes sammen med dig.
translations.ja: あなたの成功を一緒にお祝いしたいです.

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun (1st person singular).
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘veux’.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), feminine singular, modifies ‘réussite’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘fêter’.
Preposition introducing the prepositional complement.
Strong/disjunctive pronoun (2nd person singular); object of the preposition ‘avec’.

sentences.target: Sa réussite donne envie à toute l’équipe.
sentences.reading: /sa ʁe.y.sit dɔn ɑ̃.vi a tut le.kip/

translations.fr: Sa réussite donne envie à toute l’équipe.
translations.ipa: /sa ʁe.y.sit dɔn ɑ̃.vi a tut le.kip/
translations.en: Her success inspires the whole team.
translations.es: Su éxito inspira a todo el equipo.
translations.de: Ihr Erfolg inspiriert das ganze Team.
translations.it: Il suo successo ispira tutta la squadra.
translations.ko: 그녀의 성공은 팀 전체에 영감을 줍니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她的成功激励着整个团队.
translations.yue: 佢嘅成功激勵成個團隊.
translations.pt: O sucesso dela inspira toda a equipe.
translations.he: ההצלחה שלה מעוררת השראה בכל הצוות.
translations.tr: Onun başarısı tüm takımı ilham veriyor.
translations.vi: Thành công của cô ấy truyền cảm hứng cho cả đội.
translations.nl: Haar succes inspireert het hele team.
translations.hu: Az ő sikere az egész csapatot inspirálja.
translations.hi: उसकी सफलता पूरी टीम को प्रेरित करती है.
translations.el: Η επιτυχία της εμπνέει όλη την ομάδα.
translations.ja: 彼女の成功はチーム全体を勇気づけます.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), feminine singular, modifies ‘réussite’.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of ‘donne’.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); in the idiom ‘donner envie à X’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object in the expression ‘donner envie’.
Preposition marking the indirect object/recipient.
Quantifier/determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘équipe’ to mean ‘the whole team’.
Elided definite article (le/la) before a vowel-initial noun; fused orthographically with ‘équipe’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’.
